store_headline: WooCommerce Fashion Theme for Vintage and Biker Brands
store_subheadline: Sell clothing, gear, and accessories with lookbooks, quickview, and wishlist built in.
features: Bold vintage design aesthetic for fashion and lifestyle retail
Multiple homepage layouts for men's, women's, gear, and sales campaigns
Product portfolio and editorial lookbook functionality
Advanced product quickview and wishlist features
Variation swatches for colors, sizes, and product options
WPBakery Page Builder with custom e-commerce content blocks
Dynamic product showcases with Slider Revolution
Video thumbnail generation for product demonstrations
Responsive design optimized for mobile shopping
One-click demo import with complete store setups
Contact forms for customer service and inquiries
Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value)
selling_points: Leather jacket hero photography that self-selects the exact right customer in under 2 seconds
The only vintage/biker-aesthetic WooCommerce fashion theme in the catalog
Bold serif display type with urban vintage energy that makes product listings feel editorial
Lookbook integration turns your product catalog into a fashion statement, not a shopping list
Quickview and wishlist built in so browsers stay in the experience instead of leaving
Multiple homepage layouts for men's, women's, gear, and sales campaigns — one theme, full range
WPBakery drag-and-drop for custom editorial pages that reinforce the brand identity
key_benefits: Attract vintage and biker-culture buyers the moment they land
Sell clothing with a dark editorial aesthetic no generic fashion theme delivers
Showcase lookbooks that make your inventory feel like a subculture collection
Convert fashion browsers into buyers with quickview and wishlist friction removal
Cover men's leather, women's vintage, and gear from one storefront setup
Build a brand identity around biker and vintage fashion culture
Own the visual space no other WolfTheme occupies — dark, bold, subcultural
design_features: Multiple stylish homepage layouts for different retail styles
Magazine-style product catalog and grid layouts
Advanced product gallery and zoom functionality
Elegant product category and filter displays
Social media integration with Instagram shopping feeds
Sophisticated typography and spacing optimized for fashion retail
use_cases: Fashion Designer Portfolio and Sales Sites

testimonials.text: Customer Service is awesome. I've purchased a lot of different themes and their customer service is top tier as being a great theme with great features. Exactly what I was looking for!
testimonials.author: netmcgill
